calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs appearing in Propria Persona. At the request of plaintiffs in propria persona, the Court ordered case dismissed. Sanctions issued on JUN-04-2007 to each plaintiff in the amount of $350.00 each is vacated by the court. The court to prepare the order. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth CSR# 5162. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Continued To Sep-04-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs in Propria Persona are each sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/4/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. (212)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, 922-5939, specially appearing for Larry Nagelberg, counsel for plaintiffs and moving to be relieved
